Project:
Clinic Front Desk Dashboard using React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.

Application features:

- View clinic appointments
- Search appointments by patient name or mobile number
- Filter appointments by status
- Mark appointments as Checked In
- Mark appointments as Completed
- Show summary cards
- Use reusable components
- Use custom hooks
- Use Tailwind CSS
- Apply safe performance optimization

Rules:

- Use functional components only.
- Do not use class components.
- Use React hooks properly.
- Use useState for UI state.
- Use useEffect for loading data or side effects.
- Use useMemo only for derived data or expensive calculations.
- Use useCallback only when passing callbacks to memoized child components.
- Do not over-optimize simple components.
- Keep reusable components inside src/components/common.
- Keep appointment-specific components inside src/components/appointments.
- Keep custom hooks inside src/hooks.
- Keep mock data inside src/data.
- Keep utility functions inside src/utils.
- Use Tailwind CSS utility classes.
- Do not use Bootstrap.
- Use PascalCase for component files.
- Use camelCase for functions and variables.
- Keep components small, readable, and developer and user -friendly.
- Do not hard-code business data inside reusable components.
- Mention created or updated files after changes.
